message:
fix(fp-io): rename misleading adversarial test name

Rename adversarial_sql_column_name_with_spaces_rejected to
adversarial_sql_column_name_with_spaces_accepted since the test
verifies that column names with spaces ARE accepted (via SQL
quoting), not rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
